brief_justification: Arrives at exact correct answer (B) with valid gap-identification logic; only surface-level analysis — lists known slots and names the gap without exploring why or tracing second-order constraints; no reflection on reasoning method or assumption checks at any point; no explicit verification step, counterfactual test, or sanity check performed; presents conclusion as certain with no acknowledgment of any ambiguity or assumptions about witness reliability; never addresses options A, C, or D or explains why they are eliminated; the table maps all evidence and the gap is visually derivable, but the response skips explicitly closing each alternative window.
